data.title: Axoflow unveils new Security Data Layer with multiple storage solutions, tackling log management and SIEM optimization challenges.
data.description: Axoflow, a prominent company in security data management, has unveiled its latest product, the Security Data Layer in Stamford, Conn. This new offering broadens its existing pipeline services by introducing various storage options. The Security Data Layer is designed to tackle key issues in log management, SIEM enhancement, pipeline dependability, and data availability. It includes a comprehensive security data pipeline that streamlines processes such as classification, reduction, normalization, and enrichment of data. This innovation provides security teams with enhanced flexibility and cost-effective solutions.

data.title: Synthflow AI unveils WhatsApp Business Calls integration for enterprise service, improving speed on world’s leading messaging platform.
data.description: Synthflow AI, a leading enterprise voice AI platform, recently unveiled its integration with WhatsApp Business Calls. This new feature allows businesses to offer the same efficiency, consistency, and automation found in their phone lines directly through WhatsApp – a popular messaging platform used worldwide. Prior to this update, managing WhatsApp voice calls at a large scale presented challenges for businesses. Customers demand immediate responses, but workforce and operational constraints have hindered teams from meeting these expectations.

data.title: Antlara Dental in Antalya, Turkey introduces winter packages for dental tourists, catering to rising numbers during the season. 144 characters
data.description: In Antalya, Turkey, on October 24, 2025, Antlara Dental has introduced a winter package to cater to the increasing influx of dental tourists. The package includes organized stay arrangements for patients alongside comprehensive dental services. The initiative aims to accommodate the growing number of visitors seeking dental treatments during the colder months.

data.title: Economists say the Fed can cut rates after soft inflation, with CPI at 3% YoY and QQQ ETF trading at record highs. Fed likely to cut rates with markets pricing in 2 cuts this year. Fed's guidance less aggressive, risking market volatility.
data.description: Economists are suggesting the Federal Reserve has the go-ahead to cut interest rates following a recent inflation report that showed price pressures are easing. The QQQ ETF is trading at new highs after the inflation data. September's Consumer Price Index revealed headline inflation at 3% year-over-year, slightly below the forecast of 3.1%. Core inflation also dropped from 3.1% to 3%, with a monthly increase of just 0.2%, less than expected. This data signals a green light for the Fed to consider rate cuts. Markets are anticipating two rate cuts by year-end, with three more in 2026, but the Fed's guidance suggests only two more cuts in 2025 and possibly one in 2026. This discrepancy could lead to market volatility according to experts. The full story can be read on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Unsloth's tool streamlines LLM training on NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs for quicker results with less VRAM. #AI #innovation
data.description: A new open-source framework called Unsloth allows for efficient Large Language Model (LLM) training on NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs. This framework is democratizing AI development by significantly improving throughput and cutting down on VRAM usage, making it more accessible to developers.

data.title: Fidelis Care grants $130,000 to 10 providers for food security programs in NY State to support health equity.
data.description: Funding from grants is being directed towards health equity initiatives focusing on innovative food security and Food Is Medicine practices. These programs are designed to support the community and are being facilitated by Fidelis Care, a health plan covering over 2.4 million members in New York State and affiliated with the Centene Corporation.

data.title: Des Moines' Federal Home Loan Bank releases Q3 2025 financials, declares dividend.
data.description: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has risen by 2% to 6.5% in the last quarter. This increase in unemployment has been attributed to the closure of several businesses during the pandemic, leading to over 300,000 job losses. Additionally, the report highlighted that the average income has decreased by 8% to $45,000, further impacting individuals and families. Experts are now calling for government intervention to address the rising unemployment and income inequality in the country.

data.title: Hot Wheels expands Formula 1 collection to all 10 teams, including Ferrari and Aston Martin, reflecting 2025 liveries.
data.description: In El Segundo, California, Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT) has disclosed an updated Hot Wheels Formula 1® collection as part of a multi-year licensing deal with Formula 1®. The collection will now encompass all 10 Formula 1® teams, such as Scuderia Ferrari HP Team and Aston Martin Aramco Formula One™ Team™. These models will feature accurate liveries and driver lineups for the official Formula 1® 2025 season. This expanded lineup will be accessible in both the Hot Wheels core.
